summary: An outstanding board‑audience mix captures a barn‑burning Boise show that many rank among the Dead’s all‑time best, blazing nonstop to a triumphant Baby Blue.
review: Both reviewers rave about this performance, calling it one of the band’s top shows ever and praising the relentless energy from the opening jam through the final note of "Baby Blue." The board/audience matrix recording is described as sweet, clear and top‑notch, making the concert both sonically and musically unforgettable.

ai_rating.rationale: Two detailed, highly positive reviews (4★ and 5★) consistently highlight an exceptional performance and excellent recording quality; the weighted average yields a rating in the high‑4 range.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewers note a sweet board/audience mix, describing the sound as outstanding, crisp and top‑notch with no reported flaws.

show_quality.setlist_flow: The concert is portrayed as a nonstop blaze from start to finish, with reviewers wishing only for an added third set to extend the magic.
